message:
fix(tools,server): simplify reservation dedup and use let-chain in pid check

Reservations:
- Replace separate granted_patterns HashSet with seen_paths dedup at the
  top of the loop, making the deduplication logic clearer and removing
  the dead else branch that silently skipped self-conflicts
- Simplify conflict handling: if conflicts exist, always collect them;
  if not, always grant (no third hidden state)

Server:
- Refactor pid_is_agent_mail to use let-chain pattern for the basename
  check, reducing nesting

Cargo.lock:
- Add proptest dependency for ftui-harness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
